field.name: loyalty_rule_id
field.invisible: not is_wallet or payment_type != 'inbound' or not partner_id
field.domain: [ ('active', '=', True), ('currency_id', '=', currency_id), ('min_amount', '<=', wallet_amount), '|', ('company_id', '=', False), ('company_id', '=', company_id), '|', ('wallet_type_id', '=', False), ('wallet_type_id', '=', wallet_type_id), '|', ('date_from', '=', False), ('date_from', '<=', context_today()), '|', ('date_to', '=', False), ('date_to', '>=', context_today()), ]
